validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK, .NET 11 preview). net8.0/net9.0 targeting packs ARE available and build succeeds. CI is authoritative for full tests. MSTestAdapter.PlatformServices.UnitTests can't run locally (net462/net48 restore issues + AwesomeAssertions path error).

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate state-machine allocations in PropertyBag.Single<T>() and SingleOrDefault<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator state machine in PropertyBag.OfType<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: avoid iterator allocation in GetRetryAttribute()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator allocations in test execution hot path
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator and GroupBy allocations in IsIgnored() hot path

backlog.title: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Return struct type directly for zero-alloc duck-typed foreach.
backlog.notes: Would eliminate last alloc in property filter path. Requires breaking public API change — not allowed by repo rules.

backlog.title: TestMethodValidator.IsValid: parameters.Any(p => p.IsOut || p.ParameterType.IsByRef) lambda — discovery path only, low impact
backlog.notes: Compile captures nothing so delegate is likely cached by JIT. Low impact — only called during test discovery.

backlog.title: ServiceProvider.GetServicesInternal() yield-iterator + .FirstOrDefault() pattern. Low priority — not per-test hot path.
backlog.notes: Called from GetServiceInternal() via FirstOrDefault. Not a per-test hot path. Low impact.

backlog.title: ReflectionOperations.GetAttributes<T>() and ReflectHelper.GetAttributes<T>() still use yield-iterators. Callers are cold paths (DeploymentItems, TestMethodInfo ctor).
backlog.notes: Callers are not per-test hot paths. IReflectionOperations is internal so signature could be changed to T[] — but low impact since callers are cold paths.

notes.create_pr_tool_behavior: create_pull_request tool returns 'success' with patch file path. May or may not push branch to remote. The branch must be pre-committed locally before calling.
notes.build_env_2026-05-12: Local build succeeds for net9.0 with .NET 11 preview SDK. MSTestAdapter.PlatformServices builds with 0 warnings/errors.
notes.test_env_issue: MSTestAdapter.PlatformServices.UnitTests can't run locally — restore fails (net462/net48 TFM mismatch) + AwesomeAssertions path error for net8.0.
notes.sa1503_warning: SA1503: braces must not be omitted — always use braces even for single-statement if bodies.
notes.scan_status_2026-05-15: Comprehensive hot-path scan complete. All major allocation issues in test execution, discovery, and property filtering paths have been addressed by merged PRs. Remaining backlog is all low-priority (cold paths, public API constraints). ExceptionExtensions.IsOperationCanceledExceptionFromToken has LINQ on error path (cold). OpenTelemetry path has some yield/LINQ but it's opt-in telemetry path. Consider fresh scan in future runs after new features are added.
notes.monthly_summary_issue: IMPORTANT: Issue #7975 (May 2026 activity summary) was closed as 'not_planned' by Evangelink on 2026-05-13. Do NOT create new monthly activity summary issues — maintainer has signalled they don't want them.
notes.issue_access: Many issues are access-restricted in lockdown mode — cannot read body/comments.
